name: Pecan Tart Bars
recipeInstructions:
Crust: Preheat oven to 350°F. Mix flour, salt, and chilled butter in a food processor until the mixture resembles coarse meal. Gradually add ice water, tablespoon by tablespoon, and process just until a dough ball begins to form. Wrap the dough and refrigerate until firm. Roll the dough out on a floured surface into a 10 by 10 inch square. Fold the dough in half and then into quarters, and place it in an 8-inch square baking pan. Unfold the dough and press it firmly into the corners and sides of the pan. Refrigerate for 15 minutes.
Filling: Melt butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat and remove from heat. Stir in sugar and corn syrup until smooth. Add almond extract and vanilla extract, then add eggs and beat with a spoon until well blended. Fold in toasted pecans and pour the filling into the crust-lined pan. Place the pan in the center of the oven and bake for 50-60 minutes or until the filling is set. Cool on a wire rack, cut into small squares, and top each square with a pecan half.
